{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Daughter of Dread
| introduced = Threshold: Stories from Cradle
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Daughter of Dread]] is a name [[Kelsa]] considers using for her fighting alias.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Daughter of Dread]] is the announcer's name for [[Kelsa]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c8" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
